changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "deleted_at" timestamptz NULL, "email" text NOT NULL, "status" text NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("email") ); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account" ("status");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_profile" ( "id" uuid, "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "first_name" text NULL, "last_name" text NULL, "picture" text NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("account_id") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_profile" ("account_id");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_configuration" ( "id" uuid, "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "theme" text NOT NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("account_id") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_configuration" ("account_id");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_credential" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "deleted_at" timestamptz NULL, "credential_type" text NOT NULL, "provider_subject" text NULL, "password_hash" text NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_credential" ("account_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_credential" ("credential_type");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_certificate" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "expires_at" timestamptz NULL, "fingerprint" text NULL, "subject" text NULL, "issuer" text NULL, "serial_number" text NULL, "encrypted_payload" text NULL, "encrypted_password" text NULL, "revoked_at" timestamptz NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_certificate" ("account_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_certificate" ("fingerprint");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_email_activation" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "expires_at" timestamptz NULL, "used_at" timestamptz NULL, "token_hash" text NOT NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("token_hash") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_email_activation" ("account_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_email_activation" ("token_hash");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_password_reset" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "expires_at" timestamptz NULL, "used_at" timestamptz NULL, "token_hash" text NOT NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("token_hash") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_password_reset" ("account_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_password_reset" ("token_hash");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."account_session" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "expires_at" timestamptz NULL, "revoked_at" timestamptz NULL, "refresh_token_hash" text NOT NULL, "user_agent" text NULL, "ip" text NULL, "account_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."account"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("refresh_token_hash") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_session" ("account_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."account_session" ("refresh_token_hash");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."currency" ( "code" varchar(3), "name" text NOT NULL, "minor_unit" integer NOT NULL, "symbol" text NULL, "is_active_flag" boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), -- PRIMARY KEY ("code") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."currency" ("is_active_flag");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."tenant" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "deleted_at" timestamptz NULL, "subdomain" text NOT NULL, "name" text NOT NULL, "status" text NOT NULL, "picture" text NULL, "stripe_customer_id" text NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("subdomain") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant" ("status");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."tenant_configuration" ( "id" uuid, "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "default_timezone" text NULL, "default_currency_code" varchar(3) NULL, "tenant_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("default_currency_code") REFERENCES "control_plane"."currency"("code"), FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."tenant"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("tenant_id") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant_configuration" ("tenant_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant_configuration" ("default_currency_code");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
leandroluk@gmail.com
leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."tenant_subscription" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "updated_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "status" text NOT NULL, "start_at" timestamptz NULL, "end_at" timestamptz NULL, "cancel_at" timestamptz NULL, "canceled_at" timestamptz NULL, "is_cancel_at_period_end" boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, "stripe_subscription_id" text NULL, "tenant_id" uuid NOT NULL, "billing_plan_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("billing_plan_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."billing_plan"("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."tenant"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant_subscription" ("tenant_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant_subscription" ("billing_plan_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."tenant_subscription" ("status");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."billing_invoice" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "status" text NOT NULL, "currency_code" varchar(3) NOT NULL, "total_amount" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL, "total_tax_amount" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL, "total_discount_amount" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL, "issued_at" timestamptz NULL, "due_at" timestamptz NULL, "paid_at" timestamptz NULL, "stripe_invoice_id" text NULL, "stripe_payment_intent_id" text NULL, "tenant_id" uuid NOT NULL, "tenant_subscription_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES "control_plane"."currency"("code"), FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_subscription_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."tenant_subscription"("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."tenant"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_invoice" ("tenant_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_invoice" ("tenant_subscription_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_invoice" ("currency_code"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_invoice" ("status");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."billing_payment" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "status" text NOT NULL, "amount" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL, "paid_at" timestamptz NULL, "stripe_payment_intent_id" text NULL, "billing_invoice_id" uuid NOT NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("billing_invoice_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."billing_invoice"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_payment" ("billing_invoice_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."billing_payment" ("status");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE "control_plane"."stripe_webhook_event" ( "id" uuid, "created_at" timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), "processed_at" timestamptz NULL, "stripe_event_id" text NOT NULL, "stripe_event_type" text NOT NULL, "stripe_object_type" text NULL, "stripe_object_id" text NULL, "tenant_id" uuid NULL, -- PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES "control_plane"."tenant"("id") ON DELETE SET NULL, UNIQUE ("stripe_event_id") );
CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."stripe_webhook_event" ("tenant_id"); CREATE INDEX ON "control_plane"."stripe_webhook_event" ("created_at");

changeSet.author: leandroluk@gmail.com
leandroluk@gmail.com
